data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. MAYBEMABEL has been competitive of late and kept the ball rolling last time when 6 metres from the winner in fourth over 1609m at this track. Good enough to put herself in the winners' stall. 1. I LOVED HER FIRST finished seventh last start, beaten 50 metres at this track over 1609m. Expect her to be prominent. 4. SP DANCINWITHSTARZ has been thereabouts of late and is a great chance to break through. Good effort last time out when she finished second at this track over 1609m. 3. SHANGRI LA HANOVER is the best of the rest after finishing sixth over 1609m at this track last time out.","runners":[5,1,4,3],"exclusive":false}
